jobs.title: Website Data Scraper
jobs.description:
We need a robust yet lightweight script that can automatically pull business details from a publicly accessible government website. The information to capture will centre on business details, such as registration numbers, business name, registration date, address, etc.  

The workflow should:  
• Navigate every relevant section of the site (pagination, search filters, subsidiary pages).  
• Extract the required fields accurately
• Export clean, structured data to CSV and JSON

A Python solution leveraging requests/BeautifulSoup or Scrapy is preferred, but I’m open to other dependable stacks if

The Ebook Provider Platform is a feature-rich web application that enables users to access ebooks through a
subscription model managed via offline payments handled by sub-agents. Users receive a unique access code

comprehensive admin panel, role-based access control, and secure ebook delivery.

jobs.description:

You must be completely comfortable reading logs, fixing permissions, rescuing users who cannot log in, and keeping an eye on disk, service, and performance issues. This is a remote role, handled almost entirely through Slack chat and ticketing in both Jira and ServiceNow, so extensive experience with those two platforms is essential.

jobs.title: Power BI Financial Analytic Dashboard Creation
jobs.description:
Financial Analytics Dashboard Power BI Business Insights and KPI Tracking

I developed a Financial Analytics Dashboard to help businesses track performance, monitor KPIs, and make data-driven decisions.

Key Features:

Profit and Loss Analysis (Revenue, Cost, Net Profit)
Budget vs Actual comparison
Monthly and Year-to-Date (MTD/YTD) insights
Job analysis (Active, Closed, Aging)
Receivables and Payables tracking
Interactive filters (Region, Country, Department, Currency, Year)

Dashboard Insights:

Operating Income and Net Profit After Tax
Revenue vs Budget comparison
Cost analysis with varianc

jobs.title: Word-to-Word Text Transfer
jobs.description:
I have a collection of Microsoft Word files whose contents need to be moved, with complete accuracy, into new Word documents that I will supply as templates. Every paragraph, heading, table, and bullet must appear in the destination file exactly as it does in the source—same order, same spacing, same basic formatting (fonts, bold, italics, etc.). No re-typing is required; a careful copy-paste in Word is all that’s necessary, but I do expect a quick check in each file to catch line breaks or weird spacing that sometimes slip in after pasting.

Volume is moderate: roughly a few dozen files, each
